[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] '''Delby''' was a royal youth belonging to a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that inhabited the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. He was interested in [[Acorn/Legends|acorn]] collecting.
